sections.paragraph:
Original: פּשׁע

Transliteration: pâsha‛

Phonetic: paw-shah'

BDB Definition:

  1. to rebel, transgress, revolt
    1. (Qal)
      1. to rebel, revolt
      2. to transgress
    2. (Niphal) to be rebelled against

Origin: a primitive root [identical with H6585 through the idea of expansion]

TWOT entry: TWOT - 1846

Part(s) of speech: Verb
